'''kabudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hibonite|hibonite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-b-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hibonite|hibonite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kabudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæbidith|kæbidith]] || [[word:kæbidij|kæbidij]] || [[word:kæbidish|kæbidish]] || [[word:kæbidi|kæbidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kabubuduth|kabubuduth]] || [[word:kabubuduj|kabubuduj]] || [[word:kabubudush|kabubudush]] || [[word:kabubudu|kabubudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kabuduth|kabuduth]] || [[word:kabuduj|kabuduj]] || [[word:kabudush|kabudush]] || [[word:kabudu|kabudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kabufduth|kabufduth]] || [[word:kabufduj|kabufduj]] || [[word:kabufdush|kabufdush]] || [[word:kabufduf|kabufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kabuduthu|kabuduthu]] || [[word:kabuduju|kabuduju]] || [[word:kabudushu|kabudushu]] || [[word:kabuduku|kabuduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kabuduth|kabuduth]] || [[word:kabuduj|kabuduj]] || [[word:kabudush|kabudush]] || [[word:kabudu|kabudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kabuduthul|kabuduthul]] || [[word:kabudujul|kabudujul]] || [[word:kabudushul|kabudushul]] || [[word:kabudukul|kabudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kabuduthuthu|kabuduthuthu]] || [[word:kabudujuju|kabudujuju]] || [[word:kabudushushu|kabudushushu]] || [[word:kabuduku|kabuduku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kabuduthun|kabuduthun]] || [[word:kabudujun|kabudujun]] || [[word:kabudushun|kabudushun]] || [[word:kabudukun|kabudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kabuduthuoro|kabuduthuoro]] || [[word:kabudujuoro|kabudujuoro]] || [[word:kabudushuoro|kabudushuoro]] || [[word:kabudukuoro|kabudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
